message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false

actor "Professor" as Professor
boundary "tela principal" as TelaPrincipal
control "StudentController" as StudentController
entity "StudentEntity" as StudentEntity

activate Professor
activate TelaPrincipal

Professor -> TelaPrincipal : visualizar a lista de alunos
TelaPrincipal -> StudentController : requisitar lista de alunos
activate StudentController
StudentController -> StudentEntity : buscar por alunos
activate StudentEntity
StudentEntity --> StudentController : lista de alunos
deactivate StudentEntity
StudentController --> TelaPrincipal : responder com a lista de alunos
deactivate StudentController
TelaPrincipal --> Professor : exibir lista de alunos
deactivate TelaPrincipal
deactivate Professor

@enduml
```
